about_vision_text: Modern, fast web applications with a vision for X-fold scaling.
privacy_intro_p1: The following information is intended to give you, as a potential "data subject", an overview of how your personal data is processed and of your rights under data protection laws. In principle, it is possible to visit these web pages without providing any personal data. However, if you wish to use specific functions, for example within web applications, the processing of personal data is required, including for registration and the assignment of a user interface. If the processing of personal data is necessary and there is no legal basis for such processing, VISIONX.DEV will generally obtain your consent.
privacy_intro_p2: The processing of personal data, such as your name, address or email address, is carried out in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and in compliance with applicable country-specific data protection provisions. Through this privacy policy we wish to inform you about the scope and purpose of the personal data we collect, use and process.
privacy_intro_p3: As the controller responsible for processing your data, we implement technical and organisational measures to ensure the best possible protection of the personal data processed. However, internet-based data transmission and data management may generally have (unknown) security gaps, so absolute protection cannot be guaranteed. Providing your personal data is voluntary and failure to provide it does not result in any disadvantages for you.
privacy_responsibility_label: Controller within the meaning of the GDPR:
privacy_definitions_intro: This privacy policy is based on the terminology used by the European legislator when adopting the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This privacy policy is intended to be both easy to read and understandable for you.
privacy_personal_data_text: Personal data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. An identifiable natural person is one who can be identified, directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, an online identifier or to one or more factors specific to the physical, physiological, genetic, mental, economic, cultural or social identity of that natural person.
privacy_data_subject_text: Data subject means any identified or identifiable natural person whose personal data is processed by the controller.
privacy_processing_text: Processing means any operation or set of operations performed on personal data, whether or not by automated means, such as collection, recording, organisation, structuring, storage, adaptation or alteration, retrieval, consultation, use, disclosure by transmission, dissemination or otherwise making available, alignment or combination, restriction, erasure or destruction.
privacy_restriction_text: Restriction of processing means the marking of stored personal data with the aim of limiting their processing in the future.
privacy_profiling_text: Profiling means any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person.
privacy_pseudonymisation_text: Pseudonymisation means the processing of personal data in such a manner that the personal data can no longer be attributed to a specific data subject without the use of additional information.
privacy_processor_text: Processor means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which processes personal data on behalf of the controller.
privacy_recipient_text: Recipient means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or another body, to which the personal data are disclosed.
privacy_third_party_text: Third party means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or body other than the data subject, controller, processor and persons who, under the direct authority of the controller or processor, are authorised to process personal data.
privacy_consent_text: Consent means any freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous indication of the data subject's wishes by which they signify agreement to the processing of personal data relating to them.
privacy_legal_basis_p1: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR serves VISIONX.DEV as the legal basis for processing operations where we obtain consent.
privacy_legal_basis_p2: Where processing is necessary for the performance of a contract, it is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR. If VISIONX.DEV is subject to a legal obligation, processing is based on Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR. In rare cases, Art. 6(1)(d) GDPR (vital interests) or Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interests) may apply.
privacy_ssl_text: Websites and web applications developed by VISIONX.DEV use SSL or TLS encryption for security. You can recognise an encrypted connection by "https://" and the lock symbol in the browser address bar.
privacy_server_logs_title: Data Collection When Visiting the Website
privacy_server_logs_text: When using VISIONX.DEV websites for informational purposes only, only the data that your browser transmits to the server (server log files) is collected. This may include: browser type and version, operating system, referrer URL, subpages visited, date and time of access, IP address, internet service provider. This data is used for statistical analysis and to improve data security. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(1)(f) GDPR.
privacy_third_party_share_title: Disclosure of Data to Third Parties
privacy_third_party_share_text: Your personal data will not be transmitted to third parties for purposes other than those stated. VISIONX.DEV will only pass on your data if you have given express consent (Art. 6(1)(a)), legitimate interests exist (lit. f), there is a legal obligation (lit. c) or disclosure is necessary for the performance of a contract (lit. b).
privacy_cookies_general_text: VISIONX.DEV uses cookies on its websites. These are small files that your browser creates and stores on your device. Cookies do not cause any damage and do not contain malware. They are used to make the use of the website more pleasant (e.g. session cookies). Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(1)(f) GDPR. You can set your browser to not store cookies; complete deactivation may mean that not all functions can be used.
privacy_content_title: Content of Websites and Web Applications
privacy_registration_text: When registering for certain web applications, the personal data provided in the registration form is collected and stored. Passwords are stored in encrypted form. In addition, IP address, date and time of registration are stored. The data is used exclusively internally and for functional purposes. You can request information, correction or deletion of your data; the contact is VISIONX.DEV (info@visionx.dev).
privacy_contact_text: When you contact us (e.g. by email), personal data is collected and used solely to respond to your enquiry. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Your data will be deleted after your request has been processed, at the latest after half a calendar year.
privacy_google_analytics_text: VISIONX.DEV may use Google Analytics. This involves creating pseudonymised usage profiles and using cookies. The information generated (browser type, operating system, referrer URL, hostname, time) may be transmitted to Google in the USA. IP addresses are anonymised (IP masking). You can prevent collection by using a browser add-on.
privacy_rights_title: Your Rights as a Data Subject
privacy_rights_label: Right to confirmation, access (Art. 15), rectification (Art. 16), erasure (Art. 17), restriction (Art. 18), data portability (Art. 20), objection (Art. 21)
privacy_rights_text: You have the right to confirmation, free access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and to object to processing. You may withdraw consent at any time with effect for the future. You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
privacy_storage_text: VISIONX.DEV stores personal data only for the period necessary to achieve the storage purpose or as required by law. After this period, the data is routinely blocked or deleted.
privacy_updates_title: Currency and Amendments to this Privacy Policy
privacy_updates_text: This privacy policy is as of May 2023. Changes may be necessary due to further development of the websites or changed legal requirements. The current privacy policy can be accessed at any time at /datenschutz.
terms_disclaimer_p1: No claims for liability shall arise.
terms_disclaimer_p2: Despite careful checking of content, we cannot assume any liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
terms_disclaimer_p3: The operation and maintenance of the VISIONX.DEV website and any web applications that may be associated with it is carried out exclusively on a private basis and without commercial use or profit-making intent. Use is voluntary. No guarantee is given for the functionality or availability of the VISIONX.DEV website or any web applications created under VISIONX.DEV. The operator of VISIONX.DEV reserves the right to modify or discontinue the VISIONX.DEV website and its associated web applications at any time without prior notice.
terms_disclaimer_p4: Open source software (e.g. Node.js, SvelteKit) is used to create web applications or websites, the use of which is free under an open source licence and does not require special mention (e.g. under an MIT licence).
terms_disclaimer_p5: If image material is used, it is only used when the image rights are held by the domain owner or when it may be used freely under a free licence, even without special attribution of the authors.
terms_regulatory_p1: Personal data may be collected in the context of the VISIONX.DEV website and its associated web applications; please refer to the current privacy policy at visionx.dev/privacy.
terms_regulatory_p2: External data, information or links to external websites or web applications may be stored in the databases of the respective applications by users or registered visitors of the VISIONX.DEV website and its associated web applications. The operator of VISIONX.DEV assumes no liability for the content of this external data, information and links. VISIONX.DEV reserves the right to check this data for legality and offensiveness and to delete it in the event of violations.
terms_regulatory_p3: The VISIONX.DEV website and its associated web applications stand for a free and open worldview and respectful interaction with one another. VISIONX.DEV recognises the equality of all people, regardless of gender or perceived gender identity, sexual orientation, age, origin, political views and opinion. Any content that suppresses individual fundamental rights and freedoms in this sense, as well as content of a violent, criminal, racist or immoral nature, is not permitted and will be deleted. The operator of VISIONX.DEV reserves the right to block users who violate these rules and, if necessary, to take legal action.
terms_medical_text: Medical progress is subject to constant change. New findings can change the current state of medical knowledge in a short time. Despite the greatest possible care in the preparation of the content of this website, no guarantee can be given for the correctness, completeness and topicality of the content. The content of this website is for information and assistance only and in no case replaces personal advice, examination or diagnosis by a specialist or expert. The tools provided in the context of this website and the associated web applications must not be used alone and without verification for making diagnoses. Please observe any disclaimer in this regard. Every user is encouraged to carefully check the tools offered for possible errors or misstatements on VISIONX.DEV and to report them.
